mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in PAYEMS signals broad income growth and supports household spending, raising expected corporate revenue and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month PAYEMS momentum is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in no more than 50% of walk-forward observations or Rank IC is below 0.03 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in UNRATE signals weakening labor demand and rising recession risk, reducing expected earnings and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered UNRATE increases are followed by nonnegative average 20-day S&P 500 returns or if hit rate for negative returns is below 55% in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: High FEDFUNDS combined with non-decelerating CPIAUCSL inflation keeps discount-rate pressure elevated and delays monetary easing, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above 3.5 and CPIAUCSL 3-month growth is greater than or equal to its 12-month growth
regime_hint: restrictive monetary policy with sticky inflation
failure_condition: Reject if the joint high-rate sticky-inflation trigger produces positive average 20-day S&P 500 returns or if the interaction term is not negative in rolling out-of-sample regressions.

mechanism_narrative: Rising RSAFS after adjusting for CPIAUCSL inflation signals resilient real consumption demand, improving near-term sales expectations and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if real retail-sales strength is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in less than 55% of triggered cases or the average triggered return is not above baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in INDPRO below its recent trend signals weakening goods-sector output and operating leverage pressure, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO crosses below its 6-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO downtrend triggers are followed by nonnegative mean 60-day S&P 500 returns or if negative-return hit rate is below 55% out of sample.

mechanism_narrative: An upswing in HOUST signals stronger construction demand and improving cyclical credit appetite, supporting earnings expectations and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses above its 6-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST upside crossings fail to produce positive average 60-day S&P 500 returns or if the signal has Rank IC below 0.03 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month decline in FEDFUNDS signals easier discount-rate conditions and improved liquidity, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS falls by at least 0.25 percentage points over 1 month
failure_condition: Reject if 5-day S&P 500 returns after FEDFUNDS cuts are not positive on average or if triggered returns are not higher than unconditional returns in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Positive GDPC1 growth with stable or falling UNRATE signals expansion without immediate labor-market deterioration, supporting earnings expectations and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter growth is positive and UNRATE does not rise over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if the joint positive-growth stable-unemployment condition is followed by nonpositive mean 60-day S&P 500 returns or if either component fully subsumes the interaction out of sample.
